name: fapex
description: Fapex — Web3 Freelance Platform (Hardhat contracts monorepo root)

scripts.test: node scripts/prepare-dispute-timings.js prod && hardhat compile && hardhat test
scripts.deploy:sepolia: node scripts/prepare-dispute-timings.js demo && hardhat compile && hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:sepolia:prod: node scripts/prepare-dispute-timings.js prod && hardhat compile && hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
